title: TFMG - Steeled Pumpjack
description: Modifies TFMG's Pumpjacks to better match the steel palette.
body:
Ever felt the TFMG Pumpjacks lacked consistence? Or that the tiny 0.05 pixel gap was too much to look at?

This Resource Pack, adding tweaked textures to all pumpjack parts ( except the support ), fixes the gap and adds more art goodness to the rest of it all. 

Bathe in the glory that is managing to manufacture steel!

This pack is entirely based off the textures originating from the mod, besides the standard pumpjack. Original assets belong to Pepa and DrMangoTea, all rights reserved to them
